steps.title: Fastest path: mark the figure first
steps.content: Mark the given angle relationships on the figure first: equal angles, vertical angles, supplementary angles, parallel-line angles, and triangle sums of $180^\circ$. Most of these questions become a short angle chase once the givens are marked.

steps.title: Identify corresponding sides
steps.content: Since $A$ corresponds to $X$, $B$ corresponds to $Y$, and $C$ corresponds to $Z$, side $AB$ corresponds to side $XY$.

steps.title: Apply the scale factor
steps.content:
Each side of triangle $XYZ$ is 2 times the corresponding side in triangle $ABC$. Therefore:
$$XY = 2 \cdot AB = 2 \cdot 16 = 32$$
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
